title: oldenlandia capitellata var. pubescens
intro: Oldenlandia capitellata var. pubescens, also known as the hairy stem oldenlandia, is a plant species of the family Rubiaceae, which is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia capitellata var. pubescens include reducing fever, relieving headaches and joint pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically studied.
